event: A scene from Don Quixote depicting a military engagement or passage through a mountain gorge
description: A dramatic black-and-white engraving by Gustave Dore depicting a scene from Cervantes' Don Quixote. A large body of mounted and foot soldiers surges through a narrow mountain gorge. A stone bridge or aqueduct spans the gap at upper right, with a single figure heroically defending or holding it against the advancing force. Towering, craggy rock walls rise on both sides, creating a claustrophobic and dramatic composition. The detailed cross-hatching and powerful contrasts of light and shadow are characteristic of Dore's illustration style. A caption appears at the bottom of the print.
